overall.description: A character in a dark coat walks through a rocky canyon that gradually opens into a wide valley with ancient stone ruins. The footage is from a high-quality game engine with cinematic lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon
narrow dirt trail winding through the canyon floor
pile of loose rocks and debris at the base of the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The path is bare dirt with minimal vegetation, and the sky is only partially visible overhead.

events.description: canyon walls recede and path widens, grass appears on the banks

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon opens up and vegetation increases

entered.detail: clumps of green grass growing along the path edges
rolling green hills visible at the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens, with the rock walls receding into the distance. Grass patches appear along the dirt path, and distant hills become visible at the canyon's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with ancient stone ruins

events.description: canyon opens completely revealing ancient stone ruins on the hillside ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone ruins in the open valley

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins and crumbling walls on the hillside
tall stone tower ruin visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wide valley with dense grass covering the ground. Ancient stone ruins become visible on the hillside ahead as the character continues walking toward them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rocky canyon that gradually expands into a vast, open valley. It begins with the character walking along a bare dirt path enclosed by steep, towering rock walls that limit the view of the sky. As the camera advances, the canyon walls steadily recede and the terrain softens, introducing patches of green grass along the path as distant hills emerge on the horizon. The scene then opens fully into a wide valley blanketed in dense grass, shifting the perspective from a narrow corridor to an expansive landscape. Finally, the camera tracks the character's progress toward ancient stone ruins perched on a hillside in the distance.
